code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut has = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          if not list.contains(nums, v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
        has = false
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      has = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    if not list.contains(nums, v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let count = list.len(nums)
mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut placed = 0
mut last_val: Int = 0
mut have_last = false

while placed < count
  mut cur_min: Int = 0
  mut found = false
  for x in nums
    let elig = if have_last
      x > last_val
    else
      true
    end
    if elig
      if not found
        cur_min = x
        found = true
      else if x < cur_min
        cur_min = x
      end
    end
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, cur_min)
  last_val = cur_min
  have_last = true
  placed = placed + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
print(out)
